characters.name: Ada North
characters.description: Archivist; methodical, first through the door.

characters.name: Milo Voss
characters.description: Nervous insider who arrives suspiciously early.

notes.title: Manual test note for Screenplay mode
notes.content: Manual Alpha test note. Verify mode, Manuscript, Outline, PSYKE and characters; then save/reload.

notes.title: Unicode stress
notes.content: Unicode stress (manual): "Curly quotes", em dash — ellipsis … emoji 🐕, accented: Zampanò, città, perché.

scenes.title: Archive - Dawn
scenes.content:
INT. ARCHIVE - DAWN

Ada North enters carrying a notebook.

MILO VOSS
You are late.

ADA NORTH
The door was not supposed to be open.

psyke_entries.name: Threshold
psyke_entries.notes: A recurring motif about crossing from preparation into irreversible action.
